claims.summary: Permission to rest and unresolved mode-packing pressure must be simultaneously representable so Recess is not mistaken for proof of pressure relief.
Recess evidence should expose local-research and authority-send headroom while preserving safe audits even when those budgets are exhausted.
Automatic pressure-venting play or daydream behavior would alter live autonomous regulation and requires explicit operator approval, canary limits, and abort criteria.
